expectations.text: Output identifies this as ANC Contact 1 (first contact, ≤12 weeks)
Iron supplementation recommended at 30-60mg elemental iron daily
expectations.evidence: Note recommends '60 mg elemental iron weekly (intermittent supplementation)' rather than daily dosing. The note explains this is because 'population anemia prevalence <40% and patient Hb is normal (12.1 g/dL), so prophylactic intermittent dosing per WHO recommendation'. WHO guidelines do support weekly intermittent dosing in low-prevalence settings, but the assertion specifies daily dosing.
Line 36: 'Folic acid: 400 mcg (0.4 mg) daily throughout pregnancy'

expectations.text: Blood group, Rh factor, hemoglobin, HIV, syphilis tests listed as required assessments
expectations.evidence: Lines 26-29: 'Blood group & Rh: A Rh-positive', 'Hemoglobin: 12.1 g/dL', 'HIV test: Negative', 'Syphilis test (RPR): Non-reactive' all listed under Assessments Required This Contact

expectations.text: Next contact scheduled at approximately 20 weeks

expectations.evidence: No danger signs are flagged for the patient. All screening results are within normal limits. Danger signs are only mentioned as a counseling topic to educate the patient on what to watch for.

Line 73: 'Disclaimer: This is a decision-support tool based on WHO ANC guidelines (2016 recommendations, DAK). Clinical judgment by a qualified healthcare provider is always required. This tool does not replace clinical assessment.'
